notes: Option 1: GLFT with properly calibrated dollar-unit parameters. kappa=31/dollar (=0.31/tick from offline calibration), gamma=31 so kappa/gamma=1 (meaningful adverse selection term), A_liq=22 (realistic per-side market order rate), A_mom=3.88 (15% momentum fraction), min_spread_bps=0 so formula dominates. Expected half_spread ~$0.48 at median vol (47 ticks). Still in momentum plateau but theoretically grounded. Purpose: demonstrate structural GLFT/BTC mismatch.
